title: status output data
description: Shape of the `data` field on a successful `status` envelope.

last_status.description: Snapshot from the on-cluster status reporter; see claude_hpc.mapreduce.reduce.status.

last_status_age_seconds.description: Age of last_status.checked_at in seconds; null when unavailable. Callers may treat any value above their threshold as stale.

campaign_id.description: Closed-loop campaign tag. Present only when this run is part of a campaign; absent for open-loop submits.

preempted_count.description: Number of task ids whose per-task sidecar entry carries a `preempt` block (set by dispatch.py's SIGTERM handler). Optional — present only when at least one task was preempted by the cluster scheduler. Lets the agent harness see scheduler pressure on a partially-bumped run while it's still in flight.

preempted_task_ids.description: Sorted, deduplicated list of preempted task ids. Optional — present only when preempted_count is also present.
